description: Name of player who pulled the ballcarrier's flags; left empty if ballcarrier ran out of bounds or scored
Whether or not pass was complete
Pass rusher name; if there are multiple pass rushers this is the one lined up over the center
Name of blocker who engages passRush1; typically the center
Whether or not passRush1 got pressure on the QB; possible values are 0 (no pressure), 0.5 (pressure after 3 seconds/due to QB scramble/QB unaffected), or 1 (pressure within 3 seconds)
Name of blocker who engages passRush2; typically the cone
Whether or not passRush2 got pressure on the QB
Name of blocker who engages passRush3; empty if free rush
Whether or not passRush3 got pressure on the QB
Whether or not team got pressure on the QB; max of individual passRush fields
MM:SS timestamp of when the play begins in the game footage
